title: Creating an automation for individual tasks in a group
excerpt:
It is possible to set up an automation for an individual task in a group, rather then the whole group? 
I need to set one up so when a status changes on each task, a different manager receives an email.

posts.author: Ng84 (Nikki Gearing)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is possible to set up an automation for an individual task in a group, rather then the whole group?

I need to set one up so when a status changes on each task, a different manager receives an email.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Ng84

Welcome to the community. If you can identify the items where you want to run an automation (e.g. by status) you can add a AND ONLY IF in your custom automation, like:

image1483×372 15.7 KB

posts.author: Ng84 (Nikki Gearing)
posts.cookedHtml: Hiya, thank you. Wouldn’t that be an automation that would effect the whole group though, rather then one line/ task of the group?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: It depends how many items have the status selected (Done in the example above)
